notes: v1.1.0 — A big one for mod management. Right-click any instance → Update Mods to refresh every mod in one click (via Modrinth). Installing a mod now offers to grab its required dependencies (like Fabric API) automatically. And the new Migrate button imports your instances — worlds, mods and configs — from Prism, CurseForge, Modrinth or the official Minecraft launcher. (Accounts can't be moved, so just sign in again.)
